title: Release v1.16.1 (bugfix): bump tuple, self-onboard, impacted verify, tag, push, dispatch CI
action: Release flow per bee-release-flow: node scripts/bump_version.mjs 1.16.1 (writes the 4-place tuple + regenerates release manifest) -> regen chain inside THIS cell: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write -> run commands.test (impacted, foreground) green -> single release commit 'release: v1.16.1 — ...' -> tag v1.16.1 -> git push origin main --tags -> gh workflow run CI --ref main. Mode-gate: 0 flags, release machinery, tiny. No host propagation (removed 2026-07-17).

truths: release tuple consistent across all registry members
tag v1.16.1 on the release commit
artifacts: release commit + tag v1.16.1 on origin

verify: node scripts/bump_version.mjs --check && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && git describe --tags --exact-match HEAD
